headline: Elon Musk's Tesla, LG Energy Solutions Sign $4.3 Billion Battery Deal: Report
summary: LG Energy Solutions and Tesla have signed a $4.3 billion deal for LFP batteries. LG will supply batteries to Tesla from its U.S. facility.

headline: Sundar Pichai Tells Employees To Embrace AI Or Fall Behind As Google-Parent Prepares For $85 Billion Spending Surge
summary: Google CEO Sundar Pichai has told employees to adopt AI tools more aggressively to boost productivity, as the company plans to spend $85 billion in 2025 while limiting headcount growth.

headline: Bitcoin Trades Flat Ahead Of Fed Interest Rate Decision; Ethereum, Dogecoin Gain: Analyst Says 'Next Impulse' Will Send BTC To $130,000
summary: The cryptocurrency market remained calm Tuesday ahead of the Federal Reserve’s interest rate decision, with traders expecting the central bank to keep rates unchanged.

headline: Unitedhealth, Starbucks, Novo Nordisk, UPS And Meta: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
summary: UNH, SBUX, NVO, UPS, META were among the stocks seen trending on Tuesday, July 29, 2025.

headline: Microsoft Is Frustrating The Ability Of Users To Switch Away From The Edge Browser, Alleges Opera In Brazil Anti-Trust Complaint
summary: Opera has filed an antitrust complaint in Brazil accusing Microsoft of unfairly favoring its Edge browser on Windows devices, reigniting concerns over browser market competition.
